UG-19  SPECIAL CONSTRUCTION. Vessels of special or novel design that do not conform to the requirements of UG-22 through UG-34 may be constructed, subject to the approval of the Inspector. Such vessels shall be subjected to proof tests in accordance with UG-101. All welds on special construction vessels shall comply with UW-26 and shall be examined as required by UW-11. Wall thickness shall meet the minimum requirements of UG-27. Marking shall be in accordance with UG-116. For guidance on allowable stress values, refer to UG-23.
